entry.title: Re: How to enhance standart screen of migo?

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

entry.title: Re: SQVI
entry.content:
Hi,

 

yes there is a way, already answered here: https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-and-automation-discussions/abap-program-to-copy-sqvi-query-from-one-user-to-another-user/td-p/10069457

 

All you need to do is to translate that answer.

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

entry.title: Re: how to remove decimal places from field type number i...
entry.content: Yeah, you right its not suported in job requisition, this is probably a system limitation as of the moment and would suggest to raise an enhancment request. if no workaround is available.

entry.title: SCMW Error DLV_BATCG (107) when using Stock Segments in EWM
entry.content:
What is happening:

During the processing of the inbound delivery the following error occurs:

Details of the error message:

Explanation and how to proceed:

EWM gets the batch data from the class SAP_EWM_LOBM, which consists of reference characteristics to the batch fields in table MCH1. The reference to the stock segment field MCH1-SGT_SCAT is missing.
This can easily be fixed in two easy steps:

First, create a characteristic ZLOBM_SGT_SCAT in transaction code CT04.

In a second step assign the new characteristic to the class SAP_EWM_LOBM. Since SAP_EWM_LOBM classifies batches, the Class Type is 023.
Use transaction code CL02.

entry.title: Re: Enabling checkbox Delivery Completed for released Purchase Order
entry.content:
This requirement has been solved by my colleague. For anyone who's having the same requirement, here is the code.

METHOD if_ex_me_process_po_cust~fieldselection_item.

  DATA: lwa_header TYPE mepoheader.

  lwa_header = im_header->get_data( ).

  IF ( sy-tcode = 'ME29N' OR sy-tcode = 'ME22N' ) AND lwa_header-frgke = 'R'.
    DATA(ls_fieldselection) = VALUE mmpur_fs(
        metafield   = '76'   " ELIKZ - Delivery Completed Indicator
        fieldstatus = '+').
    INSERT ls_fieldselection INTO TABLE ch_fieldselection.
  ENDIF.

ENDMETHOD.

The metafield value for ELIKZ is 76, by inserting it to ch_fieldselection table on this method it will activate the Deliv. Compl. checkbox.

entry.title: Re: Error in Customer Master Migration in Migrate your Data
entry.content: Hi Vijaykumar, thank you for the advice. I'm able to upload after using a different external number.

entry.title: Re: Bin sorting in EWM
entry.content:
Hi @Yellappa ,

"Because putaway happens in bin naming sequence or as per sorting with Crossline put away sorting." -> Please do not confuse bin name with bin sorting 

-> Bin ( Bin Name): This is the Physical Identification of Location/Precise/Exact point of Warehouse Location. 

-> bin sorting: Technically it is a number in system however in business understanding it is an activity (Picking, Putaway, Replenish, Stock taking...etc) which should perform as per sequence(number) which could be define as per Harehouse operations . Example: Warehouse has bins called WH-EX-01-01,WH-EX-01-02,WH-EX-01-03, in this case business is willing to fill/putaway the Product A stocks first in WH-EX-01-03, then WH-EX-01-01, then WH-EX-01-02 and however business is picking product A first WH-EX-01-02, then from WH-EX-01-01 then from WH-EX-01-03, in this cases bin sorting must be used to cater such requirement. 

Hope it clears. 

Kind Regards,

Ajit

entry.title: Enhancing Maintenance Order and Task List Structure Lists with additional field
entry.content:
We have a requirement to enhance both the Change Maintenance Order (W0017) and Change Maintenance Task List (W0021) apps' Materials Structure lists with an additional column displaying Material Type data. We have identified eams3_s_sp_struct_list as the underlying structure for the displayed list that will need to be extended, however it is currently restricted to be not extensible and therefore any changes would not be clean core compliant. Please confirm that altering the Structure Lists in this way is a product gap and please indicate when this structure will have a clean core compliant method of alteration.

  1. Open Fiori launchpad
  2. Navigate to either Change Maintenance Order (W0017) or Change Maintenance Task List (W0021)
  3. Open the "Operation Data" Tab
  4. Open the "Materials" Tab
  5. Open the "+ Select from Structure List" button
  6. Items are displayed, Material type, if relevant, is required to be displayed

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Planning Modernization
entry.content:
Thank you for reading!
I’d love to hear your perspectives on BW modernization—especially when it comes to how it’s shaping your cloud planning strategies.
Are you seeing similar shifts in your organization or projects? Do you think the cloud-native planning tools are mature enough to fully replace traditional BW-based approaches?
Let’s share insights and experiences—curious to learn how others are navigating this transition!

This session will provide valuable insights into SAP Cloud ALM, covering both implementation and operations. Whether you are new to SAP Cloud ALM or looking to deepen your understanding, this is the perfect opportunity to engage and learn from the comfort of your location.

Agenda:

entry.title: Re: Delivery 80000057 does not exist in the database or i...
entry.content: hello hasan, it was never the issue related to number ranges. someone activated the work flow on PGI, that is why it was not working. I'd to get help from ABAPer, and now its resolved as Faheem said.

entry.title: Re: Delivery 80000057 does not exist in the database or i...
entry.content: hi faheem, thanks for this guidance, i have already checked the number ranges as hasan guided for multiple times but did not had the idea of a workflow would have been creating this issue. the ABAPer removed the workflow and now PGI is successful. thanks for the help man.

entry.title: Notification for work order Clean Up
entry.content:
Hi Gurus!

 

I would just like to check if we have a clean up functionality in SAP for notifications where the workorders are already closed.

The reason why this happens is because the business uses Fiori in closing work orders which then gets passed to ECC so the notifications are not getting closed even though work order is closed.

We could do a dev in fiori to also close the notification but for those that were already affected, how can we do a clean up of notifications?

entry.title: Re: Expose the custom field in SAP C4C V2
entry.content:
@Prathiba : As mentioned inn screenshot.

go to settings -> Extensibility Administration -> Select entities Quote -> Add Custom fields-> Automatically this field will come to ODATA

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM 종합 온라인 웨비나에 참여하세요!
entry.content:
SAP Cloud ALM 종합 온라인 웨비나에 참여하세요! | June 24th

안녕하세요 여러분,

 

SAP Cloud ALM온라인 웨비나에 여러분을 초대하게 되어 대단히 기쁘게 생각합니다. 세션 진행 일자: 06월 24일 오전 10:30시 ~11:30시 (한국 시간 기준)

본 세션은 SAP Cloud ALM의 구현 및 운영에 관한 귀중한 인사이트를 제공합니다. SAP Cloud ALM을 처음 접하거나 이해도를 높이고자 하는 분이라면 누구나 편안하게 참여하여 학습할 수 있는 완벽한 기회입니다.

세션 아젠다:

  1. SAP Cloud ALM 개요
  2. SAP Cloud ALM 구현
  3. SAP Cloud ALM 운영
  4. SAP Cloud ALM을 사용하여 RISE with SAP의 클린 코어 원칙 준수
  5. 질의응답(Q&A) 시간

 

지금 등록하여 SAP Cloud ALM이 여러분의 디지털 전환 여정을 어떻게 지원할 수 있는지에 대한 소중한 지식을 얻어보세요!

참가비는 무료입니다!

지금 등록하기

 

 

온라인으로 만나 뵙기를 기대하겠습니다!

entry.title: Error in approval process
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

i have an issue while approving workflow with detail information issue below, please help:

The approver approved the leave registration record on Success factor, and the approval was successful, but I don't know why the system sent a notification email to the approver after the approval was successful. does anyone know why and what to do to make the system not send the notification email after the approval was successful? and content of email notification from the system is "There was an error in processing your response to an approval. Please go here to try again:"

Thanks

entry.title: Re: NoClassDefFoundError: Could not initialize class com....
entry.content:
Hi @gp5 ,

Since the local build is successful, the following points can be reviewed to debug the issue:

  1. Please verify if the com.sap.cloud.security dependency is available in the central repository. There might be a possibility that the required library is present locally but not in the central repository, which could result in the class not being identified after deployment.

  2. Ensure that the version of the com.sap.cloud.security library is compatible with your Java version and other dependencies in the project. You can use the Maven dependency:tree or Gradle dependencies task to identify any potential conflicts between different versions of the same library.

I hope this helps.

Best Regards,
Anjali Pathak

entry.title: Re: How-to: Adding text types selectively to the Delivery Pick List output
entry.content:
Hello there,

Thank you so much for the explanation! This is so clear!

However, I have a similar request on the Billing Document Header text, and I couldn't seem to restrict the output from printing only specific types of texts and exclude the rest.

Form Template: SDBIL_CI_STANDARD_AU
Header Text Fields available: TX05, TX06, TX15 etc.
Header Text Field wanted to be excluded in Output (Print): TX15

So in Adobe LiveCycle, the node sits as "frmHeaderNote" > txtContent and txtTypeCode.
Then I put in a validation code as "
if (this.txtTextElement.rawValue == "TX15")
then
    this.rawValue = "inactive";
endif

But the output still prints out all the text fields, including TX15.

Could you please be so kind to shed some light on this one please? Really appreciate it.

Thanks, 
Sunny

entry.title: Re: Fiori Tile loading issues
entry.content: what's your problem?

entry.title: 🇧🇷 Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core (São Paulo, Brazil)
entry.content:
This SAP CodeJam event is on the topic of Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core and Python. You do not need to have any background in the topic, but a lot of curiosity!

In this CodeJam you will learn how to use Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core to implement a retrieval augmented generation (RAG) use case to improve the responses of large language models (LLMs) and reduce hallucinations. You will learn how to deploy an LLM and the orchestration service on SAP AI Core and query it via SAP AI Launchpad and the Python SDK. Furthermore, you will learn about the most important genAI concepts and create and use text chunks and embeddings to improve your RAG response.

This is a free in-person event and is planned for Friday, July 25th in São Paulo, Brazil 🇧🇷 from 09:30 to 14:30 local time. The language of the event and the content will be in English. The instructors are @josh_bentley and @SavioMarques from SAP.

The event is kindly being hosted by Exed Consulting in the Exed AppHaus São Paulo, thank you! Please note that spaces are limited - we can only accommodate 25 attendees. 

Prerequisites: Any Chromium-based web browser, such as Google Chrome, Microsoft Edge, etc.

Visit the SAP CodeJam group for more information on SAP CodeJam events, to ask questions, and to chat with your fellow attendees.

This SAP CodeJam event is on the topic of Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core and Python. You do not need to have any background in the topic, but a lot of curiosity!

In this CodeJam you will learn how to use Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core to implement a retrieval augmented generation (RAG) use case to improve the responses of large language models (LLMs) and reduce hallucinations. You will learn how to deploy an LLM and the orchestration service on SAP AI Core and query it via SAP AI Launchpad and the Python SDK. Furthermore, you will learn about the most important genAI concepts and create and use text chunks and embeddings to improve your RAG response.

This is a free in-person event and is planned for Tuesday, August 5th in Lima, Peru 🇵🇪 from 09:30 to 14:30 local time. The language of the event and the content will be in English. The instructors are Developer Advocate @ajmaradiaga and @RichHeilman from SAP.

Please note that spaces are limited - we can only accommodate 25 attendees. 

Prerequisites: Any Chromium-based web browser, such as Google Chrome, Microsoft Edge, etc.

Visit the SAP CodeJam group for more information on SAP CodeJam events, to ask questions, and to chat with your fellow attendees.

In this CodeJam you will learn how to use Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core to implement a retrieval augmented generation (RAG) use case to improve the responses of large language models (LLMs) and reduce hallucinations. You will learn how to deploy an LLM and the orchestration service on SAP AI Core and query it via SAP AI Launchpad and the Python SDK. entry.title: Re: Lookup Table Business Rule
entry.content: Hi Srinu & WirkKarl, Thank you for the suggestions and Help. I have added updated the image of the rule. I tried matching it but still it is picking first values only. I tried reaching SAP over a case but they tagged it as custom solution. Could you please check and help.

entry.title: Re: Interface Register
entry.content:
I have created such an service. You are calling a Rest-GET request (no payload) and the empty request message is mapped to the get request for SOAP directory API for query the artifacts. In the response message i am looping the artifacts and call from the mapping again directory API to get the details and map the result with the columns into a flat structure. 

This API you then also can request from Excel to get display the artifacts with all attributes that are interesting for you.

BR Helmut

entry.title: Re: Implementing National ID with Validity Period in SAP...

entry.title: Re: S_ALR_87012394 can be used with Fiori
entry.content:
Hi @MartineKokoh 

You can see below Fiori app for the SAP GUI t code - S_ALR_87012394. 

You can find the details of the app in Fiori APP library. 

App Name - Prepare Tax Report, Prepare Tax Report - Canada

App ID S_ALR_87012394
 

 

Please check and confirm.
 
 
Regards
Vijaykumar

This SAP CodeJam event is on the topic of Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core and Python. You do not need to have any background in the topic, but a lot of curiosity!

In this CodeJam you will learn how to use Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core to implement a retrieval augmented generation (RAG) use case to improve the responses of large language models (LLMs) and reduce hallucinations. You will learn how to deploy an LLM and the orchestration service on SAP AI Core and query it via SAP AI Launchpad and the Python SDK. Furthermore, you will learn about the most important genAI concepts and create and use text chunks and embeddings to improve your RAG response.

This is a free in-person event and is planned for Friday, August 12th in Bogota, Colombia 🇨🇴 from 09:30 to 14:30 local time. The language of the event and the content will be in English. The instructor are Developer Advocates @ajmaradiagaand @RichHeilman from SAP.

Visit the SAP CodeJam group for more information on SAP CodeJam events, to ask questions, and to chat with your fellow attendees.

entry.title: 🇵🇪 SAP CodeJam ABAP Cloud (Lima, Peru)
entry.content:
This SAP CodeJam event is on the topic of the ABAP Cloud, and specifically introduces attendees to ABAP Cloud and the ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model. ABAP Cloud is the ABAP based development model for S/4HANA Cloud, S/4HANA on premise, and SAP BTP, ABAP environment. Learn how to use proven and new technologies, such as Core Data Services (CDS) and behavior definition and implementation languages, to build SAP Fiori apps and OData services on any of the ABAP Cloud options. In this hands-on experience, developers will create their first ABAP applications using ABAP Cloud, expose and consume services via HTTP, and explore the ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model.

This is an in-person event only (not virtual) and is planned for Monday 4 August 2025 in Lima, Peru  from 09:30 - 15:30 local time. The language of the event and the content will be English.

Location: SAP Peru SAC, Av. Club Golf los Incas 154, Santiago de Surco 15023, Peru

The instructor is Developer Advocate @RichHeilman 

Here are essential prerequisites that must be completed by every attendee, before arriving at the event location. They are documented here: abap-exercises-codejam/prerequisites.md at main · SAP-samples/abap-exercises-codejam (github.com).

Please note that spaces are limited - we can only accommodate 25 attendees. Register here in the Community Event using the RSVP functionality.

For more information on SAP CodeJam events, to ask questions, and to chat with your fellow attendees, head over to the SAP CodeJam group.

This SAP CodeJam event is on the topic of the ABAP Cloud, and specifically introduces attendees to ABAP Cloud and the ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model. ABAP Cloud is the ABAP based development model for S/4HANA Cloud, S/4HANA on premise, and SAP BTP, ABAP environment. Learn how to use proven and new technologies, such as Core Data Services (CDS) and behavior definition and implementation languages, to build SAP Fiori apps and OData services on any of the ABAP Cloud options. In this hands-on experience, developers will create their first ABAP applications using ABAP Cloud, expose and consume services via HTTP, and explore the ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model.

This is an in-person event only (not virtual) and is planned for Thursday 7 August 2025 in Mexico City, Mexico  from 09:30 - 15:30 local time. The language of the event and the content will be English. 

Location: IBM México, Calle Alfonso Nápoles Gandara 3111, Col. Parque Corporativo de Peña Blanca, Delegación Álvaro Obregón, C.P. 01210

Please note that spaces are limited - we can only accommodate 25 attendees. Register here in the Community Event using the RSVP functionality.

For more information on SAP CodeJam events, to ask questions, and to chat with your fellow attendees, head over to the SAP CodeJam group.

entry.title: Try to change generated dynpro - changes do not apply
entry.content:
I have a dynpro that has been generated from a customizing view. It contains two long fields which I wanted to shorten visually. So I reduced the visible length and set the field to "scrollable". I did this hundreds of times before in other generated Dynpros.

In this case, the changes do not apply - the fields remain with their original length on the dynpro.

In a copied version of the dynpro, everything works out fine:

 

Is there maybe some cache I should clear?

entry.title: Re: PO change in SAP
entry.content:
You won't solve this w/o programming. If you have a middleware at hand (e.g. SAP PI or Integration Suite) you can easily map the outbound ORDCHG IDOC in an inbound PORDCH IDOC.

If the two POs are linked together via an SO (3rd party order) than you might get it done via customizing. I assume you have a scenario own company 1 orders something on own company 2 and own company 2 orders something with an external vendor? So your own company 1 should place the ORDCHG to SAP SD for own company 2 - here you go via purchase req to PO of own company 2 and update accordingly.

if both are not suitable, you have to do a programming. Create a Z-outbound function module that produces PORDCH IDOC for inbound and assosiate it to a Z-process code (WE41) like this

 

BR Helmut

entry.title: 🇨🇴 SAP CodeJam ABAP Cloud (Bogota, Colombia)
entry.content:
This SAP CodeJam event is on the topic of the ABAP Cloud, and specifically introduces attendees to ABAP Cloud and the ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model. ABAP Cloud is the ABAP based development model for S/4HANA Cloud, S/4HANA on premise, and SAP BTP, ABAP environment. Learn how to use proven and new technologies, such as Core Data Services (CDS) and behavior definition and implementation languages, to build SAP Fiori apps and OData services on any of the ABAP Cloud options. In this hands-on experience, developers will create their first ABAP applications using ABAP Cloud, expose and consume services via HTTP, and explore the ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model.

This is an in-person event only (not virtual) and is planned for Monday 11 August 2025 in Bogota, Colombia  from 09:30 - 15:30 local time. The language of the event and the content will be English. 

Location: SAP Colombia S.A.S. Ak 9 #115-06, Bogotá, Colombia

The instructor is Developer Advocate @RichHeilman 

Here are essential prerequisites that must be completed by every attendee, before arriving at the event location. They are documented here: abap-exercises-codejam/prerequisites.md at main · SAP-samples/abap-exercises-codejam (github.com).

Please note that spaces are limited - we can only accommodate 25 attendees. Register here in the Community Event using the RSVP functionality.

For more information on SAP CodeJam events, to ask questions, and to chat with your fellow attendees, head over to the SAP CodeJam group.

entry.title: Story Changes Lost in Edit Mode Due to Active Bookmark in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Community,

While working in Edit Mode in SAP Analytics Cloud, I noticed that changes made to a story sometimes get lost after saving. After some testing, it seems this happens when a Bookmark is active during the editing session. The story appears to revert to the bookmarked state, discarding the new changes.

Has anyone else experienced this behavior?

  • Is this expected functionality?
  • Is there a way to disable or reset Bookmarks automatically in Edit Mode?
  • Any best practices to avoid this issue?

Appreciate any insights or workarounds. Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: Fiori Tile loading issues
entry.content:
because you asked for all

you should select "App" the dropdown.

entry.title: Re: How to fetch Country of Origin from MARA to MCH1 in b...
entry.content: HI Raymond, Sorry to bug you further. What I did: 1. create a new characteristics by copying LOBM_HERKL; 2. Add it to the material class type 032 3. in CU01 or CT04- Dependency, the syntax : $SELF.LOBM_HERKL=$PARENT.LOBM_HERKL Please kindly correct me. P.S. attaching screenshot not possible but only comment on this feedback.

entry.title: Getting error while adding New system in VS CODE using SAP Fiori generator.
entry.content:
In SAP Fiori Generator, Data Source and Service Selection->Connect to system->ABAP on Premise->enter system URL->user->login. I am getting dump in the wizard.Pls suggest.

Observations

1. In my system its shows -1, but in others system it shows blank. 

2. The generator is working fine if I directly connect to the odata services, but gives error during system connect.

 

 

 

 

{"message":"@sap/fiori:app generator failed - {\"message\":\"Could not update method 'validate' in 'abapOnPrem:serviceSelection' question in generator '@sap/fiori:app' - evaluateMethod() Cannot read properties of null (reading 'value')\",\"stack\":\"TypeError: evaluateMethod() Cannot read properties of null (reading 'value')\\n at Fiori.validate (C:\\\\Users\\\\username\\\\AppData\\\\Roaming\\\\npm\\\\node_modules\\\\@sap\\\\generator-fiori\\\\generators\\\\open-ux-shared\\\\index.js:1:1283672)\\n at w.<anonymous> (c:\\\\Users\\\\username\\\\.vscode\\\\extensions\\\\sapos.yeoman-ui-1.16.7\\\\dist\\\\extension.js:2:2746217)\\n at Generator.next (<anonymous>)\\n at c:\\\\Users\\\\username\\\\.vscode\\\\extensions\\\\sapos.yeoman-ui-1.16.7\\\\dist\\\\extension.js:2:2740597\\n at new Promise (<anonymous>)\\n at r (c:\\\\Users\\\\username\\\\.vscode\\\\extensions\\\\sapos.yeoman-ui-1.16.7\\\\dist\\\\extension.js:2:2740342)\\n at w.evaluateMethod (c:\\\\Users\\\\username...

entry.title: Re: Im trying to distribute OD to my warehouse but its ge...

entry.title: Re: Fiori Tile loading issues
entry.content: Thanks Sir,

entry.title: Re: Fiori Tile loading issues
entry.content: Thanks Sir, I accept the solution. How to set APP as default.

entry.title: Re: Key-user extensibility and updating fields
entry.content: Hi Junwu, I'm not sure I understand your answer, but this is still an open case for me. There is no way for me to update this field va RAP objects (via EML or API call). I_EquipmentTP doesn't have the field, A_Equipment has the field but it is not mapped in the behaviour, R_EquipmentTP has the field but it is als not mapped in the behaviour. So I'm wondering still what the vision is on this. I would expect us to be able to use the standard RAP objects to be able to update fields we have added via Key-user extensibility. But this seems not to be the case. THis also means that the fields are added to standard FIori apps, but then can't be edited in those apps, so what is the point? Any idea what the general rule should be? (we are on version 2023 something, so maybe that explains it)

entry.content:
Select here Apps instead of All option form dropdown

Regards

entry.title: Re: 自動付款可否跨公司不同公司幣別進行付款
entry.content:
Hi Expert,
According the kba 2257645:
The entry is not accepted since these requirements are not met.
There are legal, taxation and banking requirements which differ from country to country and are possible reasons for the standard system restriction.


But I could use the app "Post outgoing Payments" to reach the same outcome manually.


Payment company is 02US with company currency EUR. Payment company are 04JP and 6310. I can select different currency company for the payment and post as below.

And create three entries for this inter-company transaction.

SO this why I am so confused with the automatic payment cannot do the same thing?

entry.title: How to Mass Maintain WBS Element for Multiple PO Items with Account Assignment Category Q
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I'm currently working with Purchase Orders in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, and I've run into an efficiency issue when dealing with multiple PO items that use Account Assignment Category Q (Proj. make-to-order
).

As expected, when selecting category Q, the system requires the WBS Element field to be filled at the item level. This works fine functionally, but it becomes very time-consuming when I have to input the same WBS Element for a large number of line items.

What I've tried so far:

  • ✅ Manually entering the WBS element per item (works, but inefficient)

  • ✅ Creating one item with the correct WBS Element and then copying the entire item. This helps retain the WBS field, but still requires me to manually update material number, quantity, and price for each copied line — which is still quite tedious.
  • ❌ Couldn't find an APP or options that seem to support mass-edit or table input mode for WBS elements

Is there any efficient way to mass update or copy the WBS Element across multiple PO items when using account assignment category Q in S/4HANA Public Cloud?

Any advice, workaround, or configuration tips would be highly appreciated.

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: 自動付款可否跨公司不同公司幣別進行付款
Re: Error while Creating BP for Customer - "BP role JD10...
entry.content: Hello Sir, Can you please let me know how to search for this note because in SNOTE tcode i get error as No SAP Notes found in Local system and Unable to search for Notes at SAP ONE Support

entry.title: Re: Best Approach to Trigger SAP CPI Interface Periodical...
entry.content: Thanks for the suggestion, but maintaining plant and storage location in CPI value mapping isn't feasible for us. These values can change over time, and updating value mappings manually each time isn’t scalable. We prefer triggering from S/4 or BTP with dynamic input in the payload itself.

entry.title: Re: Group Reporting Public Cloud Edition Consolidation Mo...
entry.content:
We plan to first also offer a replacement capability for the data monitor tasks (roadmap) introducing the concept of process periods for data monitor tasks as well.

Then there will be a dual use phase for both monitors where we will monitor the adoption of the successor apps. The decision on final removal of the deprecated apps is not taken yet but we plan that the cons monitor (old) app will stay until at least one major release after the release of the new data monitor task capabilities.

entry.title: Re: Try to change generated dynpro - changes do not apply
entry.content: Empty the screen buffer via the command field /$DYN (like we have /$SYNC for clearing all SAP buffers)

entry.title: Re: Notification for work order Clean Up
entry.content:
Greetings,

you should be able to close notifications while technicačly completing a maintenance order. Below is a screenshot from "Maintenance Notifications and Orders" app.

Best regards, M.

entry.title: Re: Extending SAP Fiori App: My Inbox – Approve Purchase Requisitions (F0401A)

Hello,

I would like to implement a feature similar to the existing code, but specifically within the Purchase Requisition tab. I need to add some additional fields to this tab.

Additionally, I would like to create a new tab within the application.

Could you please guide me on how to locate the appropriate view to make these additions?

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Joule for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition - A Comprehensive Setup Guide
entry.content:
Dear @nageshcaparthy ,

I have some questions on this.

  1. Why we need cloud connector for this, because its not S/4 Hana On-premise system, because my fiori is running on hosted domain, will not it connect directly with that? (If mandatory, is it required to install and setup for each users who is gonna use Joule?)
  2. Is it mandatory to create new subaccount or we can use same where we deployed some SAPUI5 and CAPM apps?
  3. How is pricing gets applied? As per discovery Center, its based on token but I really have confusion on how to map token and my prompt?

Thanks for your valuable blog. I would like to know your response on these queries.

entry.title: Re: Email Notifications in SAP Cloud ALM for Implementation
entry.content:
Thanks Moritz!

Even if we switch the responsible every time, it does not send notification on Status change of Feature. It sends notification on assigning Feature like that but not on status change.

Also, I have another query on the sequence of Transports import in Cloud ALM, Could I ask in same thread?

Regards,
Krishan

entry.title: is it possible to deactivate central procurement hub function (in demo) instance
entry.content:
https://community.sap.com/t5/spend-management-q-a/central-procurement-hub-activation/qaq-p/12290756

is it possible to deactivate central procurement hub function (in demo) instance because we SUSPECT this function is disabling the PR ability to link individual contracts (central contract is not suitable for client)

entry.title: Change confirmed delivery date in VA02
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

Is it possible to set in customizing whether it is allowed to postpone an already confirmed delivery date to a sales order item?

If so, can the extent to which a date may be postponed also be defined?

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Universal Journal Import - Cannot Run UJ Task in Peri...
entry.content: Also you may want to consider that with the group reporting preparation ledgers (GRPL) the treatment of the special periods changes. When running a release task with GRPL activiated special periods are mapped 1:1 between accounting and GR. Hence processing of the release task in special periods is possible and required in GRPL.

entry.title: Re: Implementing National ID with Validity Period in SAP...
entry.content: A very helpful blog really helped me to implement for my company release work task Thanks a lot!

entry.title: Re: Implementing National ID with Validity Period in SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central
entry.content: A very helpful blog really helped me to implement for my company release work task Thanks a lot!

entry.title: Re: Successfactors Position Management - Transition process in Employee Central
entry.content: @vpathangi Will there be system alert to HR if the position is Overstaffed (say in the event the resignation is withdrawn)?

entry.content: hi, I have faced the same problem and non of the above suggestions helped in my case (another browser, clearing cache etc...). I had to create a support case

entry.title: Re: Part Period Balancing in PP/DS (SAP_PP_005 Heuristic)
entry.content: Your post provides a very helpful and clear introduction to cost-based modeling. It's a piece that could even be used as a reference when explaining IBP optimizer to new users. Thank you for sharing such valuable content.

entry.title: Creating Local Entry Point for Business Solutions in SAP Build Work Zone
entry.content:
Creating Local Entry Point for Business Solutions in SAP Build Work Zone

High-level Overview (TL;DR)

In our previous blog, we introduced multi-tenant support for HTML5 business solutions using a central SAP Build Work Zone  instance. Now, we're excited to announce the new Local Entry Point (LEP) concept of SAP Build Work Zone that simplifies how providers integrate business solutions into SAP BTP. With LEP, providers can now automatically generate a standalone entry-point site on subscription without requiring a Work Zone instance on consumer tenants. This blog explains how to leverage LEP in your multi-tenant business solution.

Introduction

If you haven't read my previous blog discussing business solutions, CDM, and cross-subaccount federation of business applications, I recommend reviewing it first. It provides the context on the underlying concepts of CDM based content provider in SAP Build Work Zone. This blog assumes you understand these concepts and builds on them.

Since Q3 2024, SAP Build Work Zone supported multi-tenant entry points through a centralized instance & managed AppRouter, allowing consumption of HTML5 solutions across multiple subaccounts. Now, the newly released Local Entry Point (LEP) offers even more flexibility, enabling standalone entry points without requiring a Work Zone instance on the consumer side. Instead, the LEP mechanism automatically generates the entry-point site for subscribed SaaS solutions. This significantly reduces the administrative tasks required on the consumer side.

In a nutshell, Work Zone now offers a new service plan under the SAP Build Work Zone standard service (customers and partners). This plan enables SaaS application developers to use Work Zone as a managed reuse service that generates an entry point (standalone site) for the SaaS solution upon subscription in the consumer subaccount. This approach is similar to the existing SAP Cloud Portal Service (launchpad module) and serves as the successor for current usage of Cloud Portal Service in SaaS solutions.

In this blog, I will do a deep dive into how you can leverage LEP as a developer of multi-tenant business solution on SAP BTP, what are the provider subaccount and consumer subaccount administration tasks and finally compare the 2 approaches available in Work Zone to support entry points to SaaS applications.

Developer Flow: Local Entry Point

LEP is build on the principles of cross-subaccount federation of business solutions. Therefore, the sample pre-requisites hold good for LEP implementation as well - Work Zone content definition in cdm.json and ensuring all UI5 app manifests include the unique business solution identifier as sap.cloud.service name.

On a high level, the major difference to central instance based multitenant business solution federation are use of Standalone AppRouter and use of Work Zone standard local-entry-point plan as a reuse service to enable out of the box entry point which is generated upon subscription of the SaaS application on the consumer subaccount.

Pre-requisites

In the following technical deep dive, I would assume that you are familiar with SaaS development best practices on BTP and already have a multi-tenant CAP application where you intend to enable WZ Local Entry Point. In addition, verify the following before moving ahead - 

  1. MTA deployment descriptor is already generated.
  2. Standalone AppRouter is configured.
  3. Deployment configurations for HTML5 applications are in place & HTML5 repo (runtime & host) are added as resources in mta.yaml. 
  4. Every UI5 app manifests have the unique & uniform sap.cloud.service name.
  5. In the target deployment subaccount, ensure that there is an entitlement to SAP Build Work Zone service and service plans standard and local-entry-point.

If you do not have a multi-tenant CAP application already, and you wish to follow along with a sample application (completed code) - refer to this GitHub repo branch. I will be referencing this repo itself for all sample code in the rest of the blog.

Now, let's see detailed step-by-step approach to enable Local Entry Point. 

Assumption: You already have a mult-itenant CAP application & all pre-requisites are met

At first, 8 steps to enable LEP may seem very daunting, but I have broken down the tasks to smaller steps so that we understand what we are doing and why. I hope you will find the setup rather straight forward.

Step 1: Define Work Zone content in CDM format

This step is same as what was discussed in my previous blog. In order to access any Business Solution across subaccounts, the best practice is to expose the Work Zone content definition from provider (source) subaccount in CDM format and adding it as a content provider from consumer (target) subaccount. Same is true for Central Work Zone instance based access to SaaS applications - which are deployed in provider subaccount and consumed from the subscription subaccount - making it essentially a cross-subaccount access scenario. Although the consumer subaccount does not require a Work Zone instance or manual creation of content provider in the new Local Entry Point based approach, the underlying mechanism is still the same. It's just that the CDM based federation is automated under the hood, as part of the SaaS subscription flow and no additional administrative effort is required.

To define the Work Zone content as CDM, please refer to the SAP Build Work Zone documentation on CDM. You can refer to this cdm.json as sample and adapt it to your project requirements. I will not dive into the specifics of schema and how to create the cdm.json but focus on the 2 specific aspects around CDM for LEP - 

  1. LEP only support CDM schema version 3.1 or above and does not support Groups. Hence, the cdm.json should use spaces, pages or workpages.
  2. You must include one (and only one) site entity definition in the cdm.json which will be the default site for the Local Entry Point for the SaaS application and users would be routed to this site on the subscription side. This is also the entity where you can define the subset of site parameters which are usually available in the site administration view of Work Zone. For example, you can define the display config (site view mode, page width, etc.) browser setting (async loading, browser feature access, etc.), user capabilities (personalization, theme selection, locales, enterprise search, etc.) and so on. Given that there is no Work Zone administration capability on the LEP based solutions, these site properties are then provider choice and the only way to influence the Work Zone site behaviour that is generated on the consumer tenant upon subscription of the SaaS application.

Step 2: Setup cdm.json as deployment resource

This is a simple step to add a build script to mta.yaml which will copy the cdm.json from wherever it was added in the project path to the app deployment resources folder so that it's deployed to HTML5 repository and hosted for consumption as content provider from consumer tenants. Below you can find a sample build-parameters section in a mta.yaml and the lines 6 and 7 should be added in already existing mta.yaml - 

build-parameters:
  before-all:
    - builder: custom
      commands:
        - npm ci
        - mkdir -p app/resources
        - cp workzone/cdm.json app/resources/cdm.json
        - npx cds build --production

Step 3: Add Work Zone LEP as reuse resource in mta

Local Entry Point approach is to use Work Zone as a managed reuse service to create a business solution specific Work Zone site on the subscription side without requiring an active Work Zone instance. Hence, it's imperative that we define this as a resource required by the SaaS application. This is done by adding it as an entry in the resources section of the mta.yaml as shown below:

resources:
  - name: incidents-build-workzone-service
    parameters:
      config:
        providerId: ${lepProviderId}-${org}-${space}
        exposureId: incidents.service 
      service-plan: local-entry-point
      service: build-workzone-standard
    type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service

Few important details to be considered - 

  1. You can choose any yaml-compliant name for the resource, but you would need this later to add dependencies / references from other resources / modules. Hence, best to select something meaningful and easily identifiable as WZ LEP resource.
  2. Exposure ID should be same as the sap.cloud.service (unique identifier for business solutions) that is used in every UI5 app manifest.json.
  3. Service Plan and service should be exactly as in the sample code above.

Step 4: Add dependency to LEP from AppRouter, AppDeployer & MTX module

Once you define the Work Zone LEP resource, it's time to make other components aware of it and hence we will add it as the dependency (requires) from AppRouter, AppDeployer & MTX module. In the mta.yaml, add the LEP resource name under requires for all the aforementioned modules -

requires:
      - name: incidents-build-workzone-service

Step 5: Add Work Zone LEP as required resource for MTX

In addition to adding the dependency in mta.yaml for MTX module, we would also need to add the SaaS registry dependency to Work Zone LEP service so that it can be used in a multi-tenant environment. This is done by adding a service dependency in the mtx/sidecar package.json. Go to mtx/sidecar/package.json and add the following - 

"requires": {
  "html5-host": true,
  "html5-runtime": true,
  "launchpad": {
    "vcap": {
      "label": "build-workzone-standard",
      "plan": "local-entry-point"
    },
    "subscriptionDependency": {
      "uaa": "xsappname"
    }
  }
}

Note that all 3 dependencies are required - html5-host, html5-runtime & launchpad. The vcap.label and vcap.plan for launchpad should remain as in the sample code above.

Step 6: Update the routes for LEP landing page in xs-app

In case of standard development flow and testing without dynamic tiles, custom domain, resource references, etc, following content of xs-app.json under the app/router folder should be sufficient - 

{
  "welcomeFile": "cp.portal/site",
  "routes": [
    {
      "source": "^(.*)$",
      "target": "$1",
      "service": "html5-apps-repo-rt",
      "authenticationType": "xsuaa"
    }
  ]
}

It basically defines the route to the launchpad / landing page which is shown when the user logs in to the Local Entry Point based Work Zone site.

Step 7: Update role template & add role collections for CDM roles in xs-security

Here there is a slight deviation to how roles are managed in cross-subaccount federation and LEP. When an Admin creates the roles manually based on a CDM source, the CDM roles are usually generated as BTP role collections with name in the pattern of ˜<content-provider-name><cdm-role-id>. But, in LEP, the role-collection is explicitly defined in xs-security.json (usually in the root of you MTA project) and it must match the role defined in the cdm.json. This is required for each and every role and there must be a matching role collection in xs-security.json corresponding to each CDM role. The matching role collections in xs-security can be added to the "role-collections" array as per following example -  

...
  "role-collections": [
    {
      "name": "Incidents_LEP",  
      "description": "Grant Administrative access to LEP",
      "role-template-references": [
        "$XSAPPNAME.Token_Exchange",
        "$XSAPPNAME.MultitenancyCallbackRoleTemplate",
        "$XSAPPNAME.support",
        "$XSAPPNAME.admin"
      ]
    }
  ]
 ...

Step 8: Deploy to provider subaccount, subscribe from consumer subaccount & test

This step is not specific to LEP as such and an obvious step for any development flow. In order to test the LEP based entry point, developers must deploy it to a dev subaccount which will act as a provider subaccount. Please note that currently, developers cannot test LEP based flow locally, which is otherwise supported in CAP based multi-tenant applications.

To deploy in Cloud Foundry, follow the standard mbt build followed by cf deploy <mtar-name>.mtar as explained in this tutorial.

Admin Flow

Provider Administration

The provider (app development team admin) manages the subaccount including adding entitlement to Local Entry Point plan for Work Zone standard service, adds trusted domains and monitors subscriptions.

As a prerequisite to deploy LEP based multi-tenant application on SAP BTP, administrators must maintain the entitlement to the Local Entry Point plan as seen here -

Once successfully deployed the service instances should show up in the respective BTP cockpit. Notice the Work Zone service can be seen as subscribed with plan as local-entry-point which should have 2 bindings as defined in MTA - MTX and the App Router applications. It should not be possible to subscribe to this solution from any subaccount and test the end-to-end flow.

You will also find the applications in the space where the SaaS application was deployed and perhaps a good place to observe that the AppRouter, MTX and CAP backend service are up and running.

On the provider subaccount, administrators can also find all subscriptions in the SaaS registry (can be accessed from Instance and Subscriptions in BTP cockpit) - 

Tenant specific route creation:

In development setup, in order to enable the subscriber tenant routes to access the provider content, Provider subaccount administrator must also create a tenant specific route for each subscriber. Please refer to this create tenant-specific route in Cloud Foundry guide. This route creation is usually done post every subscription and you would require the host name of the subscriber tenant to create it. The route should be mapped to the AppRouter application instance on the provider as well. Once done, users with required role collection assignment on the consumer subaccount would be able to access the Local Entry Point site.

Consumer Administration

Consumers have minimal administration effort: post subscription, they only need to assign users to role collections. No other Work Zone administrative tasks are required or possible.

SaaS application can be subscribed from SAP BTP Service Marketplace and once done the subscription should be visible in the Instances and Subscriptions in SAP BTP cockpit (see below for example). 

You can extract the URL to Local Entry Point either from this subscription link itself or from the button on the top right on the subscription details view (see above) - which you can then test or provide to users. 

Please note, this wouldn't work (404 Not found error) until the Provider Admin creates the tenant specific route as mentioned in the Provider Amin flow under section "Tenant Specific Route Creation". Once done, user should be able to launch the Local Entry Point site and navigate into the UI5 apps within the SaaS solution using the application URL provided the requisite role collections are already assigned - 

If you have keen eyes, you would have noticed that there's a UI integration card (declarative list type) in the site runtime screenshot above. I left it in intentionally as a teaser for what you can expect in the next blog 😉 

Central Instance vs. Local Entry Point – Key Differences

Now that there are 2 parallel options to achieve entry point for SaaS applications on SAP BTP using Work Zone, let us first demystify the options by comparing them side by side - 

Feature

Central WZ Instance

Local Entry Point

User access

Single business site for all SaaS solutions

Each SaaS solution provides its own business site

Consumer-side Work Zone Instance

Required (Standard or Advanced)

Not Required

AppRouter Management

Managed AppRouter (out of the box)

Standalone AppRouter (extensible)

Site Administration

Administered by Consumer; full Work Zone instance on consumer subaccount.

No Consumer Administration; Provider Managed as site properties in CDM

Layout Customization

Customizable by Consumers (administrator defines spaces/pages with federated business apps)

Layout Fixed by Provider (CDM-defined)
Groups are not supported

Based on these differences, one can the best approach to enable entry point to their multi-tenant business solution. 

Following 2 diagrams will help clarify the differences between these 2 options further, while presenting different subscription subaccount setup possibilities.

 

Conclusion

The Local Entry Point feature simplifies multi-tenant deployments, improving the flexibility and usability of SAP Build Work Zone integrations. Check out further details in the official documentation. Please review the current restrictions (updated regularly) to map your requirements before adopting Local Entry Point approach. Another excellent resource would be SAP BTP developer’s guide to implement multitenancy using Local Entry Point option.

Looking forward to your feedback and questions!

entry.title: How to process IDOC (DELFOR/DELJIT/DESADV)
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We require an integration for IDOC processing( Inbound & Outbound ) with one of our customer. We investigated a lot but didn't found any way to process IDOC in public cloud.

Inbound:
1. DELFOR 
2. DELJIT 

Outbound:
1. DESADV

Can you please guide us what are the services required to subscribed & how to achieve the same, we are already have CPI subscription.

Thank You


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to process IDOC (DELFOR/DELJIT/DESADV)
entry.content:
Hey there,

In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, please use SOAP or OData Service instead of IDOC.

If your requirement is to create Sales Scheduling Agreements, please refer to the below documentations for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

SAP Best Practices for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - Sales Scheduling Agreements (3NR)

Set-Up Instructions - Setting Up Sales Scheduling Agreements (3NR)

API Hub - Delivery Schedule of Sales Scheduling Agreement – Receive, Update (B2B)

Help Portal - Delivery Schedule of Sales Scheduling Agreement - Receive, Update (B2B)

For any further questions, please feel free to comment under this SAP Community Q&A. We will have topic experts to check and answer the follow-up questions.

Thx and Best Regards!

entry.title: Re: Cayman (KY) calculation procedure
entry.content:
Hi @VijaykumarV ,

So will it have any impact if I don't set a zero tax code?

Thanks !

entry.title: Quedada SAP - Let's talk about Joule - Bogota 🇨🇴 #SAPCodeJamsLATAM
entry.content:
The local SAP Community in Bogota has a chance to meet after our first of two local SAP CodeJams!

Quedada SAP in Bogota will happen on August 11th, 2024 at 18:00 local time for a few hours, so join us and be a part of our Group!  You don't have to be an attendee of our SAP CodeJam events, just someone active or curious about the SAP Community and our focus on #developers

Let’s talk about what's new in the SAP world, about interesting SAP projects in the region, and what's new with ourselves.

Please let us know if you will participate in SAP Stammtisch by clicking "I will attend", at the BBC Cerveceria that's in the W Hotel @ Avenida Carrera 9 #115 - 30, Bogota 110111 Colombia.  FYI, everyone is responsible for their own to buy a food/drink item if they wish, we are just happy for the chance to connect in person and have some relaxing conversation!

Click here to find more information about the SAP Developer Advocates Latin America Roadshow

entry.title: Quedada SAP - Let's talk about Joule - Lima 🇵🇪 #SAPCodeJamsLATAM
entry.content:
The local SAP Community in Lima has a chance to meet after our first of two local SAP CodeJams!

Quedada SAP in Lima will happen on August 4th, 2024 at 18:00 local time for a few hours, so join us and be a part of our Group!  You don't have to be an attendee of our SAP CodeJam events, just someone active or curious about the SAP Community and our focus on #developers

Let’s talk about what's new in the SAP world, about interesting SAP projects in the region, and what's new with ourselves.

Please let us know if you will participate in SAP Stammtisch by clicking "I will attend", at Bar Aleman Miraflores, Av. Alfredo Benavides 511, Lima 15074, Peru.  FYI, everyone is responsible for their own to buy a food/drink item if they wish, we are just happy for the chance to connect in person and have some relaxing conversation!

Click here to find more information about the SAP Developer Advocates second Latin America Roadshow

entry.title: Re: How to Mass Maintain WBS Element for Multiple PO Item...
entry.content: Isn't the WBS field available in App ID F2593 - Mass Changes to Purchase Orders?

entry.title: Re: Hi there, I want revoke very same question. Has anyone has solution?
entry.content: I believe that, this problem is related with permission for Manage Center of Capabilities. When I enter this action, I see only white screen. Anyone has any idea, in which situation this problem occured?

entry.title: Re: S_ALR_87012394 can be used with Fiori
entry.content:
Use the SAP Fiori Apps Reference Library to find/identify available Apps.

  • Prepare Tax Report, Prepare Tax Report - Canada

entry.title: Re: Part Period Balancing in PP/DS (SAP_PP_005 Heuristic)
entry.content:
Hi @Azk. Thanks for your feedback. As you mentioned this is very basics interpretetion. If you are more involved in cost-based modeling, you can also check out my PPO article: Production Planning Optimization (PPO) - Part I - SAP Community

I would love to have your comments on that as well.

entry.title: Quedada SAP - Let's talk about Joule - Mexico City 🇲🇽 #SAPCodeJamsLATAM
entry.content:
The local SAP Community in Mexico City has a chance to meet after our first of two local SAP CodeJams!

Quedada SAP in Mexico City will happen on August 7th, 2024 at 18:00 local time for a few hours, so join us and be a part of our Group!  You don't have to be an attendee of our SAP CodeJam events, just someone active or curious about the SAP Community and our focus on #developers

Let’s talk about what's new in the SAP world, about interesting SAP projects in the region, and what's new with ourselves.

Please let us know if you will participate in SAP Stammtisch by clicking "I will attend", we have a table reservation for 12 at Ulama, Antonio Dovali Jaime 70, Santa Fe, Zedec Sta Fé, Álvaro Obregón, 01218 Ciudad de México, CDMX, Mexico.  FYI, everyone is responsible for their own to buy a food/drink item if they wish, we are just happy for the chance to connect in person and have some relaxing conversation!

Click here to find more information about the SAP Developer Advocates second Latin America Roadshow

entry.title: Re: Improved Authorization Concept for Business Rules with 1H 2025 Release
entry.content:
Hi @MartinPosinger ,

I really appreciate your feedback.

I've improved the What's New Viewer topic so that it's hopefully much clearer how to configure the object definition of the "Rule" object.

The improved topic is going to be available on June 20th.

Kind regards,

Pierre

entry.title: Re: SAP Learning Hub
entry.content:
Hi Sriram,

Thanks for your insights. 

But I was informed that we do get certain number of certification attempts for free after taking the subscription. Is it not?

Best Regards
Arun

entry.title: Re: Cayman (KY) calculation procedure
entry.content:
Hi @0819 

You can copy the procedure and maintain.

You don't need to create zero tax but in case of transactions where you need a assign a tax code even its zero tax, you can use tax procedure and create zero tax codes. 

 

Regards

Vijaykumar
